name: Dill Pickles
recipeIngredient: 1 each 6 quart basket of small cucumbers
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash jars and scrub cucumbers. Cut off stems and blossom ends and prick cucumbers with a fork.
2 Pack the cucumbers into jars and pour boiling water over them, letting stand for 3 minutes.
3 Drain off the water. Combine vinegar, 10 cups of water, and salt in a large pot. Bring to a boil.
4 Pour the hot brine over the cucumbers in jars, add a sprig of dill, and seal immediately.
5 Allow the pickles to sit for several weeks before using.
6 A little clove of garlic can be added with the dill to create a different taste to your pickles.
